title: organic eggs
description: The MOVING reference member state of this VC (Value Chain) is ITALY UNIMOL and UNIPI. The reference MOVING Card ID of this VC is VC 47 IT. The company has closed the supply chain. It takes care of the animals from the first day of life the animals. They produce by themselves the feed mill, useful to satisfy the needs of all the animals. The eggs are daily collected in all the different typologies (traditional, on land and BIO) of production system, and transported to the market.

title: Mountain landscape and reference chains
description: The reference mountain chain of this VC is Cottian Alps. The reference mountain landscape of this VC is Dronero. Dronero is a municipality of Cuneo province, Piemonte, Northwestern Italy. Located about 20 Km Northwest to the chief city Cuneo and 100 Km to the South of Turin. Dronero has an expanding industrial area, and a fervent agricultural activity specialized in breeding and cultivating particular crops: apples, peaches, and kiwis.
